test_disposition_outcomes[Dale Pryor was convicted of the charges.-convicted]

test_disposition_outcomes[The case was dismissed at the request of the prosecutor.-dismissed]
test_disposition_outcomes[Dale Pryor pled guilty to one count.-convicted]
